title: JEE Main 2021 (Online) 18th March Evening Shift

subject: Chemistry
options: A is true but R is false
Both A and R are true but R is NOT the correct explanation of A.
A is false but R is true.
Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A.
solution:
On heating the glass, it melts and takes up rounded shape at the edges, which has minimum surface area. This is due to the property of surface tension of liquids and not due to decrease in viscosity.

Viscosity generally decreases as the temperature increases.

Hence, both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A.
title: JEE Main 2021 (Online) 20th July Morning Shift

subject: Chemistry
solution:
(A) Crystalline solids have definite arrangement of constituent particles and have long range order.

(C), (D) Different constituent particles of an amorphous solid have different bond strengths and soften over a range of temperatures.
title: JEE Main 2021 (Online) 27th July Evening Shift

subject: Chemistry
solution:
In 100 ml of hexane solution contains 0.27 g of fatty acid.

$$ \therefore $$ In 10 ml of hexane solution contains 0.027 g of fatty acid.

Volume of fatty acid present on the round glass = $${{0.027} \over {0.9}}$$

As here Area of fatty acid layer = Area of round plate = $$\pi {r^2}$$

$$ \therefore $$ Volume of fatty acid layer = $$\pi {r^2}$$ $$ \times $$ h

$$ \therefore $$ $$\pi {r^2}$$ $$ \times $$ h = $${{0.027} \over {0.9}}$$

$$ \Rightarrow $$ 3 $$ \times $$ $${\left( {10} \right)^2}$$ $$ \times $$ h = $${{0.027} \over {0.9}}$$

$$ \Rightarrow $$ h = 10-4 cm = 10-6 m
title: JEE Main 2019 (Online) 8th April Evening Slot
